product.description:
Key features:
WhatHiFi 5-Star bookshelf speakers Exceptional value for money with advanced features for the price point Curved braced cabinets help to eliminate vibrations and dissipate standing waves Gold-plated bi-wire connection separates high and low frequencies for enhanced clarity Dual reflex ports enhance overall bass response and clarity
5-year warranty & 30-day money-back guarantee included
Overview: The Wharfedale Diamond 9.1 Bookshelf Speakers are clear and precise with unmatched sound reproduction at their level. They boast curved braced cabinets that not only allude to the premium aesthetic qualities of higher-priced speakers but also help to reduce unwanted cabinet vibrations and dissipate derogatory standing waves that can negatively affect your sound. The five-inch Kevlar mid/bass driver and one-inch textile tweeter work effortlessly together offering sparkling highs and full controlled lows revealing details in your favourite tracks that may have previously gone unheard. The gold-plated bi-wireable binding posts a trait usually only found at higher price ranges ensure complete versatility in your set-up and will benefit those who aim to achieve a precise and clean sound where high and low frequencies blend harmoniously without a fight for air space.

product.product_name: Cello C50WS4K 50" inch Smart WiFi WebOS 4K Ultra HD TV Freeview Play FRAMELESS
product.description:
50″ Smart WebOS 4K Ultra HD TV with Freeview Play and Frameless Bezel
50” 4K Ultra HD LED TV LG’s Smart operating system, WebOS Hub built-in Download apps through the web browser Freeview HD by Aerial & also a Satellite tuner built-in with Freesat Bluetooth connectivity (easily add a Bluetooth soundbar) Freeview Play with 100 channels and 20,000 hours of free on-demand content 3 x HDMI inputs for your external devices and consoles Can be wall mounted (200mm x 100mm bracket & 4 pcs M5 X8 not included)
The built-in Smart platform, developed by LG, allows you to browse the web and download all your favourite entertainment apps, so you can stream directly to the TV. From Netflix, Prime Video and Disney Plus to YouTube and catch-up apps like BBC iPlayer and ITVx, a world of entertainment awaits.
With Freeview Play you can watch an impressive 60,000+ hours of TV and over 1,500 boxsets, across your favourite on-demand players. All for free.
With the built-in Bluetooth connectivity, you can add a Bluetooth soundbar to the TV. This means cinema sound can be enjoyed without the need for untidy cables. The built-in satellite tuner with Freesat provides access to over 170 channels with 100% channel coverage on a subscription-free basis. Plus, you’ll find your favourite on-demand players all in one place. You will just need to purchase and install your own satellite dish/cabling. The ultimate flat-screen TV with its super-slim bezel and lightweight design is ideal for wall mounting and easy maneuverability
Specification Screen Size 50″ Freeview Play Yes DVD Player No USB Yes – playback only Contrast Ratio 5000:1 Brightness 250 Max Resolution 3840 x 2160 Speakers 2 x 8W Smart Yes Max Power 120W Energy Rating ‘G – 71 watts on working and 0.5 watt standby power consumption HDMI 3 Inputs RF Antenna, HDMI X3, CVBS, USB x 2, RJ45 Outputs Digital Audio Out, Earphone Out VESA 200mm x 100mm Dimension w/stand W 1110 x H 733 x D 268 mm Dimensions w/o stand W 1110 x H 644 x D 34 mm Weight 9.1kg

product.product_name: 11.5" Portable DVD Player with 9.5" Large HD Swivel Screen High Volume Speaker
product.description:
About this item 👨‍👩‍👧【Portable and Magical】-- Compact design makes it easy to carry out with you. Take it on your road trip and get double surprises both on and off the screen. portable DVD player can be easily swiveled as a tablet and mounted to the car headrest, brings tons of fun for your journey. 👨‍👩‍👧【5 Hrs Battery Life】-- Upgraded battery capacity to 2500mAh, you and your family can watch 1-2 movies without any worries. There is a 3.5mm earphone jack on the right side of the portable dvd players so that you can get a concentrated and clearer sound for your private viewing. 👨‍👩‍👧【Easy Operation & Seamless Viewing】-- DVD player has a simple operating system and a convenient remote control, making it an ideal companion for the kids and elderly. Never miss out on exciting plots, the Break-point memory function can ensure seamless connection of the plot. 👨‍👩‍👧【Premium Service & Quick Response】-- We are committed to providing the best after-sales service to our customers. If you have any questions, concerns, or issues with the your device, we are here to help you 24 hours a day.
★Eye-protection LCD screen★: DVD player provide a 800*480 Swivel Screen with 270 degrees rotation and 180 degrees flip. The portable player can be swiveled as a tablet to attache to the car backseat to play. ★Super High Battery★: Upgrade battery capacity to 2 times as the original ones, ensures the 5 hours play time. Not enough? Free car charger provided in the package. ★Resume Play★: Support break-point memory function, make it possible to start from where you left at last time, no need to start again. ★Game Player★: This DVD player is more than a DVD player, we provide a free game controller in our package, kids also can use this to play 180 kinds of retro games, such as super Mario etc. Note: customer need do download game cd by yourself. ★Multi-Media★: Directly play in formats: CD, DVD, CD-R/RW, DVD-R/+R, DVD+RW/-RW, VCD, SVCD; USB and SD Card supported: MP3/WMA/WAV, JPEG, MPEG2/AVI, TXT.
The new version of portable DVD player. 3 years in portable DVD player make us understand your needs better and make prodcuts more better.
Your Home Cinema always with You: Our Portable DVD Player has a built-in USB port that allows you to enjoy your favorite movies while travelling, camping, sightseeing,you can also copy your CD files to USB or SD card. Improved battery: Improved 2000mAh Lithium battery extend the play time to 5 hours,even the adapter was left at home,do not need to worry about losing battery power whilst watching a movie.
Break Point memory: Break Point memory function make it possible to start from where you end at last time. Sync to your TV Screen: With the included AV cable, it's available to transmit the screen from DVD player to your TV to enjoy a bigger and clearer screen. Fantastic Swivel Screen: portable DVD player with 9.5 inch 270° rotation and 180° flip screen make it possible to attach to the car headrest and make you enjoy your time when you are on boring road trip.
Package Including: 1x Portable DVD player 1x AV cable 1x Remote controller 1x Power adapter 1x Car charger 1x User manual

product.product_name: Auto Mirror Adjustable Wide Angle Side Rear Mirror Blind Spot Convex Mirrors For
product.description:
Features Adjustable viewing angle for safe parking, it allows you to see clearly the rear wheel, thus it is easier to back up your car Wide-angle convex design lets you see wider field of vision,removes blind spots, perfectly to new drivers Can be installed either elow or above rear view mirrors. Easy installation with strong stickers. Aerodynamic principle design,streamlined appearance, perfect match with your car
Material: ABS+glass
Weight: 50g (single piece)
Product packaging: 1pcs
Suitable for vehicle type: universal
Installation method:
Installation method on the reflector
1. Determine the position of the adhesive on the vehicle's rearview mirror and wipe it clean
2. Tear off the double-sided adhesive protective layer on the bottom bracket of the product and stick it on the cleaned mirror surface
Installation method of rearview mirror
1. Confirm the position of the rearview mirror on the vehicle and wipe it clean
2. Insert one end of the insert provided with the product onto the product, then tear off the double-sided adhesive protective layer on the other end and stick it to the desired installation area
3. After adjusting the angle, it can be used.

product.product_name: 300ml Neti Pot Sinus Rinse Bottle | Nasal Irrigation Kit Nose Wash Cleaner UK
product.description:
Description
Description: 100% brand new and high quality Capacity 500/300ml, can be used for entire families Standard wash nose, wash nose for adult/child
Features:
Nasal wash is based on human nasal internal physiological structure characteristic for product design, experts recommend regular cleaning of the nasal cavity within the nasal cavity to remove dirt, pollen, postoperative residue, dust, etc. have a good effect to help, an individual daily nasal care and care of practical product
Packaging: safety bubble bag
How to Use:
1. Pour a package of 4.5 /2.7g nasal wash salt into the water bottle ,then add warm water to the 500 /300ml mark. 2. Please make sure water temperature is around 37℃. It should feel lukewarm if touched by finger tips .Mix nasal wash salt thouroughly until completely dissolved ,and then tighten the cap. 3. Choose the correct nozzle :Be sure to select the child nasal wash tip for children .Children cannot use adult tip. 4. Correct posture :Have your upper body leaning forward , looking down ,and with head slightly leaning no side ,Hold bottle upside down ,and gently insert the tip into one nostril .Relax ,open mouth slightly and breath (through mouth ) .DO NOT hold your breath, DO NOT breath through nose .Press the valve button at the bottom of the water bottle (Figure 1),and the solution will automatically flow .DO NOT squeeze the water bottle . Rinse solution will enter the nostril and bathe the nose and sinus and exit the other nostril.When finishing washing one nostril ,release the button to stop the solution .Rotate to wash both nostrils.
Precautions:
Do not use water or regular salt instead of nasal wash sale To avoid and discomfort ,mix nasal wash salt solution to the proper concentration by strictly following the instruction in this user guide Do not use if one side of the nose plugs,or when having otitis media or other ear disease Children 8 years or under should use this product under the guidance of the physician and parent Wash the machine throuroughly before and after each use
The product should be stored in a cool ,dry ,well-ventilated place .Avoid direct sunlight ,and kept it away from corrosive liquid or gas Note: Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thank you!
Package List:
1 x 300ML/500ML Nasal Wash Bottle (As you choose)

product.product_name: Cyperus Rotundus Oil 60ml For Hair Removal Reducing Body Hair Growth
product.description:
Features: 1. Gentle Plant-Based Formula for Smooth and Caring Hair Removal
Infused with selected botanical extracts and modern skincare technology, this formula gently softens body hair and relaxes follicles for a smoother removal process. It significantly minimizes discomfort and physical irritation, offering a delicate and skin-friendly experience that cares for your sensitive skin.
2. Purify and Prep Skin to Prevent Irritation
The product cleanses and purifies the skin’s surface, helping to unclog hair follicles before hair removal. By reducing the risk of clogged pores, it prevents common issues like red spots and ingrown hairs—leaving your skin cleaner, healthier, and prepped for a flawless experience.
3. Deep Hydration to Soothe and Restore Skin
After hair removal, skin often feels dry and sensitive. Enriched with natural moisturizing ingredients, our product penetrates deeply to replenish moisture, calm irritation, and relieve tightness. It helps restore a hydrated, smooth texture—so you can say goodbye to post-wax dryness and roughness.
4. Daily Care for Long-Term Silky Skin
More than just a hair removal aid, it’s also a daily skincare essential. With regular use, it helps maintain follicle health, resulting in finer, softer, and sparser regrowth over time. Meanwhile, the nutrient-rich formula continuously nourishes the skin, improving its texture, elasticity, and overall radiance day by day.
How to use:
1. Before use, please thoroughly clean the area that needs hair removal and ensure that the skin is in a completely dry state.
2. Take an appropriate amount of essential oil in the palm of your hand, apply it evenly to the target area, and gently massage with fingertips in circular motions for 2-3 minutes until the skin feels slightly warm. This step can help essential oils penetrate, fully soften hair roots, moisturize surrounding skin, and prepare for hair removal.
3. When performing physical hair removal operations such as scraping or using hair removal devices, the lubricating layer formed by essential oils can effectively reduce the irritation caused by scraping. After depilation, a small amount of essential oil can be taken again and gently applied to the depilated area to soothe the skin, instantly hydrate, and relieve possible burning or dryness.
4. As a daily care, a small amount of essential oil can be taken and massaged on the desired area until absorbed. Long term use can continuously moisturize the skin, inhibit hair growth rate, make newly formed hair soft and fine, and help develop a long-lasting smooth and delicate skin feel.
Notice: * Please store in a cool place to avoid high temperature and direct sunlight.
* Please keep this product out of the reach of children.
* Actual color May be slightly different from the image due to different monitor and light effect.
* Please allow 1-3cm deviation due to manual measurement.

product.description:
🔥 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Transform your car detailing routine with this Magic Clay Towel. Unlike traditional clay bars, this dual-sided cleaning cloth covers a wider area and cleans faster – using only clean water or foam. The microfiber side lifts dirt while the clay side removes bonded contaminants like oxidation, water spots, ferrous powder, light rust, brake dust, and bird droppings.
Save up to 70% of your detailing time. Reusable multiple times – simply rinse with water and store in a cool, dry place. Will not damage your car's paint or shine.
⭐ KEY FEATURES 🔹 Only Requires Clean Water – No soaps or chemicals needed for most jobs 🔹 Dual-Sided Design – Microfiber side for general wiping, clay side for stubborn contamination 🔹 Removes Tough Stains – Heavy oxidation, rainwater stains, ferrous powder, light rust, brake dust,etc 🔹 Wider Coverage – Cleans a larger area faster than a traditional clay bar 🔹 Saves 70% Time & Effort – Complete car detailing in as little as 10 minutes 🔹 Reusable Multiple Times – Rinse with water after use – won't melt or deteriorate 📋 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS Product Type Magic Clay Towel / Car Decontamination Cloth Special Features Car cleaning – removes oxidation, water spots, brake dust, bird droppings Material Microfiber + Polymer clay composite Model Options Fine clay towel (gentle) / Medium clay towel (more aggressive) Colour Blue Size Approx. 30 × 30 cm (11.81 × 11.81 inches) Weight Approx. 130g (4.6 oz) Package Included 1 × Clay Towel
